narrative:
Pierce Township I (precinct in Clermont County) has 925 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.9 percentage points.
